before_layer_change_gcode:
{if layer_num==0} ; PURGE LINE
M204 P500
SET_VELOCITY_LIMIT SQUARE_CORNER_VELOCITY=9

; --- Safe Exit from Sweep_Position ---
G1 Z10 F480
G1 X105 F7200
G1 X135 Y5 F12000 ; Travel all the way down to the FRONT of the bed

; --- Purge Sequence (Front) ---
G1 Z0.75 F900 ; for object exclusion
G1 Z0.25 F900 ; Lower to purge height
G1 E0.8 F2400
G1 E0.6 F2400
G1 F2400 ; Controlled purge speed
G1 X205 Y5 E3.72454
G1 X205 Y5.45 E.0252
G1 X135 Y5.45 E3.72454
G1 X135 Y5.02 E.02305
G1 Z10 F600 ; Lift Z safely after the wipe before starting the print
{endif}
name: Anycubic Kobra S1 Max @0.4 - Rinkhals
